action.reasoning: Observation: baseline pipeline failed immediately in mixed precision because attention masking used -1e9, which overflows float16. Analysis: this is a straightforward numerical bug; fix mask fill to a dtype-safe minimum and rerun the short baseline training with eval submission to validate the full pipeline and measure runtime. Decision: patch model.py, keep architecture unchanged, run 3-epoch training, then submit eval if training succeeds.
